overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking across a wooden bridge into a rural village with traditional log cabins, then continuing along a dirt path through open fields toward a distant castle. The scene is set on a bright sunny day with lush green summer vegetation.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across a wooden footbridge toward a thatched-roof cottage on the riverbank

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank bridge with rope railings crossing a clear river
traditional log cabin with straw thatched roof and wooden porch
clear flowing water with visible stones beneath the surface
tall white-barked tree with green foliage

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a narrow wooden footbridge over a clear river toward a rural village. A traditional thatched-roof cottage sits ahead on the bank, surrounded by birch trees and lush summer vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path between log cabins

events.description: steps off the wooden bridge onto the village dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village passing wooden houses, barrels, and various rustic props

entered.detail: dark wooden log house with steep thatched roof and decorative painted trim
stacked oak barrels beside a wooden deck
rustic wooden wagon with weathered planks
wooden frame with fish or hides hanging to dry
steep wooden steps leading up to a cabin porch

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, Geralt enters a quaint village of traditional log cabins with thatched roofs. He passes wooden barrels, a rustic cart, and drying racks as he walks along the dirt path between the houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path leading to castle

events.description: passes the last village house and enters open fields with castle visible in distance
encounters villagers walking on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through grassy fields toward a distant castle, passing other villagers

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large medieval stone castle with multiple towers and red rooftops visible on the horizon
simple wooden post fence lining the path
tall green grass and wildflowers covering the meadow

segments.scene_description: Exiting the village, Geralt enters wide open fields with a massive castle fortress visible in the distance. He continues along the dirt path past wooden fences and grassy meadows, eventually passing other villagers walking along the same route toward the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded river crossing into a quaint rural village and finally opens onto a vast landscape dominated by a distant fortress. It begins with Geralt crossing a narrow wooden footbridge over a clear river, moving toward a thatched-roof cottage nestled among birch trees and lush summer greenery. As he leaves the bridge behind, the scene shifts into the heart of a village where the path winds between traditional log cabins, passing rustic carts and wooden barrels. The environment then expands as Geralt exits the settlement, moving from the enclosed village street into wide open fields and grassy meadows. Finally, the camera follows him along a dirt path past wooden fences and fellow villagers, heading steadily toward a massive castle fortress visible on the horizon.
